title: Learn flexbox the easy way
description: Kevin Powell explains the flex shorthand combining flex-grow, flex-shrink, and flex-basis into a single declaration

title: Learn Flexbox in 15 Minutes
description: Kyle covers the flex shorthand and common values like flex 1, flex auto, and how they differ in practice

title: Flexbox Crash Course
description: Brad Traversy explains the flex shorthand property and how it sets grow, shrink, and basis in one line

title: CSS Flexbox Course
description: FreeCodeCamp covers the flex shorthand with practical examples of common flex values used in production
